title: Write numbers in number and expanded form
description: Write numbers in number and expanded form within 1000.
topic_path: Numbers in standard, word, and expanded form
Write numbers in number and expanded form

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use the place value chart to write $800+5$ in standard form.**  
*Enter a $1$ digit number in each box of the place value chart.*  

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: |:-: | :-: 
[[☃ numeric-input 2]] | [[☃ numeric-input 3]] | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] 


**What is $800+5$  in standard form?** 
 
[[☃ numeric-input 5]]
hints:
First, let's fill in $\purpleD{800}+\blueE{5}$ on the place value chart.

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-:
$\purpleD{8}$ | ${0}$ | $\blueE5$
$800+5$ in standard form is $805$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use the place value chart to write $700+60+1$ in standard form.**  
*Enter a $1$ digit number in each box of the place value chart.*  

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: | :-: |
[[☃ numeric-input 1]] | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | [[☃ numeric-input 3]]

  
**What is  $700+60+1$ in standard form?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 4]]
hints:
First, let's fill in $\purpleD{700}+\blueE{60}+\maroonD1$ on the place value chart.

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\purpleD{7}$ | $\blueE6$ | $\maroonD1$
$700+60+1$ in standard form is $761$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use the place value chart to write $100+40$ in standard form.**  
*Enter a $1$ digit number in each box of the place value chart.*  

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: | :-: |
[[☃ numeric-input 1]] | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | [[☃ numeric-input 3]]

  
**What is  $100+40$ in standard form?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 4]]
hints:
First, let's fill in $\purpleD{100}+\blueE{40}$ on the place value chart.

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\purpleD{1}$ | $\blueE4$ | $\maroonD0$
$100+40$ in standard form is $140$.

Let's use a place value chart to write $548$ in expanded form.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD5$ | $\blueE4$ | $\maroonD8$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD5\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{500}\\\\
\blueE4\text{ tens} &=\blueE{40}\\\\
\maroonD8\text{ ones} &=\maroonD8
\end{align}$
$548=\purpleD{500}+\blueE{40}+\maroonD8$

Let's use a place value chart to write $603$ in expanded form.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD6$ | $\blueE0$ | $\maroonD3$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD6\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{600}\\\\
\blueE0\text{ tens} &=\blueE{0}\\\\
\maroonD3\text{ ones} &=\maroonD3
\end{align}$
$603=\purpleD{600}+\maroonD3$

Let's use a place value chart to write $927$ in expanded form.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD9$ | $\blueE2$ | $\maroonD7$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD9\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{900}\\\\
\blueE2\text{ tens} &=\blueE{20}\\\\
\maroonD7\text{ ones} &=\maroonD7
\end{align}$
$927=\purpleD{900}+\blueE{20}+\maroonD7$

Let's use a place value chart to write $18$ in expanded form.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD0$ | $\blueE1$ | $\maroonD8$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD0\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{0}\\\\
\blueE1\text{ ten} &=\blueE{10}\\\\
\maroonD8\text{ ones} &=\maroonD8
\end{align}$
$18=\blueE{10}+\maroonD8$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its expanded form.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each number one at a time.  

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD4$ | $0$ | $\maroonD7$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD4\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{400}\\\\
\maroonD7\text{ ones} &=\maroonD7
\end{align}$

$407=\purpleD{400}+\maroonD7$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD4$ | $\blueE7$ | $\maroonD7$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD4\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{400}\\\\
\blueE7\text{ tens} &=\blueE{70}\\\\
\maroonD7\text{ ones} &=\maroonD7
\end{align}$

$477=\purpleD{400}+\blueE{70} + \maroonD7$

Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: 
$\blueE4$ | $\maroonD7$

$\begin{align}
\blueE4\text{ tens} &=\blueE{40}\\\\
\maroonD7\text{ ones} &=\maroonD7
\end{align}$

$47=\blueE{40} + \maroonD7$

Here is the completed table:

Number | Expanded form
:-: | :-: | -
$407$ | $400+7$
$477$ | $400+ 70 +7$
$47$ | $40+7$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its expanded form.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each number one at a time.  

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD8$ | $\blueE5$ | $\maroonD2$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD8\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{800}\\\\
\blueE5\text{ tens} &=\blueE{50}\\\\
\maroonD2\text{ ones} &=\maroonD2
\end{align}$

$852=\purpleD{800}+\blueE{50}+\maroonD2$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD8$ | $\blueE5$ | $\maroonD0$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD8\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{800}\\\\
\blueE5\text{ tens} &=\blueE{50}
\end{align}$

$850=\purpleD{800}+\blueE{50}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD8$ | $\blueE2$ | $\maroonD5$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD8\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{800}\\\\
\blueE2\text{ tens} &=\blueE{20}\\\\
\maroonD5\text{ ones} &=\maroonD5
\end{align}$

$825=\purpleD{800}+\blueE{20}+\maroonD5$

Here is the completed table:

Number | Expanded form
:-: | :-: | -
$852$ | $800+50+2$
$850$ | $800+ 50$
$825$ | $800+20+5$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its expanded form.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each number one at a time.  

$\purpleD{600}+\blueE{90}+\maroonD3$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD6\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{600}\\\\
\blueE9\text{ tens} &=\blueE{90}\\\\
\maroonD3\text{ ones} &=\maroonD3
\end{align}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD6$ | $\blueE9$ | $\maroonD3$


$\purpleD{600}+\blueE{90}+\maroonD3=\purpleD{6}\blueE{9}\maroonD3$

$\purpleD{600}+\blueE{30}+\maroonD9$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD6\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{600}\\\\
\blueE3\text{ tens} &=\blueE{30}\\\\
\maroonD9\text{ ones} &=\maroonD9
\end{align}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD6$ | $\blueE3$ | $\maroonD9$

$\purpleD{600}+\blueE{30}+\maroonD9=\purpleD{6}\blueE{3}\maroonD9$

$\purpleD{300}+\blueE{60}+\maroonD9$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD3\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{300}\\\\
\blueE6\text{ tens} &=\blueE{60}\\\\
\maroonD9\text{ ones} &=\maroonD9
\end{align}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD3$ | $\blueE6$ | $\maroonD9$

$\purpleD{300}+\blueE{60}+\maroonD9=\purpleD3\blueE6\maroonD9$

Here is the completed table:

Expanded form | Number
:-: | :-: | -
$600+90+3$ | $693$
$600+ 30 + 9$ | $639$
$300+60+9$ | $369$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its expanded form.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each number one at a time.  

$\purpleD{100}+\blueE{20}$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD1\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{100}\\\\
\blueE2\text{ tens} &=\blueE{20}
\end{align}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD1$ | $\blueE2$ | $\maroonD0$


$\purpleD{100}+\blueE{20}=\purpleD{1}\blueE{2}\maroonD0$

$\purpleD{100}+\maroonD2$

$\begin{align}
\purpleD1\text{ hundreds} &=\purpleD{100}\\\\
\maroonD2\text{ ones} &=\maroonD2
\end{align}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD1$ | $\blueE0$ | $\maroonD2$

$\purpleD{100}+\maroonD2=\purpleD{1}\blueE{0}\maroonD2$

$\blueE{10}+\maroonD2$

$\begin{align}
\blueE1\text{ ten} &=\blueE{10}\\\\
\maroonD2\text{ ones} &=\maroonD2
\end{align}$

Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD0$ | $\blueE1$ | $\maroonD2$

$\blueE{10}+\maroonD2=\blueE1\maroonD2$

Here is the completed table:

Expanded form | Number
:-: | :-: | -
$100+20$ | $120$
$100+ 2$ | $102$
$10+2$ | $12$
